articles.title: Jeremiah Poope takes us on the Freedom Trail for America’s 250th (yes, that’s really his name)
articles.description:
Not even a heat wave could deter this Boston Freedom Trail icon and budding social media sensation.

The post Jeremiah Poope takes us on the Freedom Trail for America’s 250th (yes, that’s really his name) appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jeremiah Poope leads tours on Boston's Freedom Trail for America's 250th anniversary.
Despite the heat wave, Poope continues to engage locals and tourists alike.
Poope's social media presence boosts interest in Boston's historical sites.

articles.title: Red Sox’ Willson Contreras and Nats’ Cade Cavalli each get 7-game bans after fight
articles.description:
Cavalli shouted at Contreras after striking him out looking on a full-count pitch. Contreras then threw his helmet at Cavalli and approached him on the mound. They began jawing at each other and both dugouts emptied.

The post Red Sox’ Willson Contreras and Nats’ Cade Cavalli each get 7-game bans after fight appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Willson Contreras and Cade Cavalli received 7-game suspensions after a fight on July 2.
The altercation occurred after Cavalli struck out Contreras, leading to dugouts emptying.
Boston Red Sox will be without Contreras for crucial upcoming games, affecting team performance.

articles.title: 60 cars burn in fire at Mass. auto auction site
articles.description:
All cars were destroyed in the flames, officials say.

The post 60 cars burn in fire at Mass. auto auction site appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Sixty cars were destroyed in a fire at a Massachusetts auto auction site.
The incident occurred on July 2, 2026, impacting local businesses.
Residents may face increased insurance rates due to the extensive damage.

articles.title: Boston hit 100. See what meteorologists are saying about chances for triple digits Friday and the July 4 forecast.
articles.description:
"Dangerous heat and humidity continues Friday."

The post Boston hit 100. See what meteorologists are saying about chances for triple digits Friday and the July 4 forecast. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston reached 100°F on July 2, 2023, marking extreme heat conditions.
Meteorologists warn of continued dangerous heat and humidity on July 4.
Residents should prepare for potential health risks due to high temperatures.
